titleStmt.title: SII 9.539: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 539. (A.R. No. 679 of 1922.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE TEMPLE OF SANNAKKI-VIRABHADRA AT HOSPET, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1453, Khara, Āśvīja, śu. 1, corresponding to A.D. 1531 September 11 Monday (not verifiable), in the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Kampadēvarasa-Aṇṇa and the Nānādēśa merchants agreed to pay at the rate of one kāsu per load of paddy and paṇas 2 on every marriage for the service of the god Gaurēśvara at Tirumaladēvi-ammana-paṭṭaṇa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipataEṁ namaḥ .
śubhamastu namastuṁgasirastuṁ
bicaṁdracāmaracāravē . tra
yilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūla
staṁbhāya śaṁbhavē Avighna
mastū . svasti śrīvijayādbhuda
yā(.)śālivāhanaśakavaruṣa
1453 neya kharasaṁvacharada
Āśvīja śu 1 lu tirumaladēviAṁ
manavara paṭaṇada śrīgaurēśva
radēvarige śrīmaṁmahārājādhi
rāja rājaparamēśvara Aṣṭadikurā
yamanōbhayaṁkara mūrurā
yaragaṁḍa Arirāyavibhāḍa śrī
Acutadēvamahārāyarū pruthvīrā
jyavanu Āḷuta yiralāgi kaṁpa
dēvarasaAṁṇanavaru Ubhayanā
nādēśau tirumaladēviA(ṁ)mmanava
ra paṭaṇada gaurēśvaradēvarige kaṁ
ḍiga payiru hēru 1 kaṁ kāsu 1 nella
payiru hē 1 kaṁ kāsu 1 maduvege
heṇṇinavaru gaṁḍinavaru koḍi¥
1 kaṭe kāṇikelu va 2 �yo mariyādēlu
koṭa dharmasāśāna Idake tapidavaru ta
(ṁ)mma hiriyamagana taleya buruḍeya
voḷage madyapānava hoykoṁḍu Anu
bhavisidavaru kāśīkṣētradali gōbrāṁha
ra koṁda samā taṁma dharmake tāvē tapida
samāna . svadattādviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ
paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattāpahā
rēṇa (.) svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.539 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
